title: aria rotundifolia
intro: Aria rotundifolia, also known as Roundleaf Aria, is a perennial plant native to North America, belonging to the plantain family (Plantaginaceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin issues, such as eczema and acne, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Aria rotundifolia include its ability to soothe and calm irritated skin, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Aria rotundifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or topical creams and ointments, allowing for various applications in traditional medicine.
